arts.ttl: Bayern Munich midfielder Joshua Kimmich carves out new role under Vincent Kompany
arts.sum: Joshua Kimmich’s role this season for Bayern Munich is in the spotlight. While back in midfield now, Kimmich’s role also has him shifting into right-back positions, especially as the team advances the ball.

arts.ttl: Confirmed lineups: Bayern Munich vs. Bayer Leverkusen
arts.sum: The lineups for Saturday's Bundesliga clash between Bayern Munich and Bayer Leverkusen have been announced.

arts.ttl: Jamal Musiala puts Premier League suitors on alert with transfer admission
arts.sum: Bayern Munich midfielder Jamal Musiala has confessed he is "open to everything" as rumours of a switch to the Premier League next summer continue to swirl. Musiala has entered the final two years of his contract with Bayern and has been heavily linked with a return to England, where Manchester City, Manchester United, Liverpool and former employers Chelsea have all been touted as potential suitors.

arts.ttl: Anticipation building ahead of Bayern Munich vs Bayer Leverkusen
arts.sum: It’s the big one in the Bundesliga today as leaders Bayern Munich host reigning champions Bayer Leverkusen in the Topspiel. It’s Vincent Kompany vs Xabi Alonso, Jamal Musiala vs Florian…

arts.ttl: Report: Arsenal could be major competition to Bayern Munich in pursuit of Bayer Leverkusen star Florian Wirtz
arts.sum: According to a report from Sport Bild journalist Christian Falk, Bayern munich could be getting more competition in its — potential — pursuit of Bayer Leverkusen star Florian Wirtz. Arsenal is interested in Florian Wirtz (21), Bayer Leverkusen (contract til 2027)

arts.ttl: Predicted Bayer Leverkusen XI vs Bayern Munich: Victor Boniface to return to the starting lineup
arts.sum: Victor Boniface is expected to start against Bayern Munich in the Bundesliga Topspiel later today as the reigning champions look to close the gap to the current leaders. The Nigerian…

arts.ttl: Predicted Bayern Munich XI vs Bayer Leverkusen: In-form Serge Gnabry to start
arts.sum: Bayern Munich host Bundesliga champions Bayer Leverkusen in today’s Topspiel with the Vincent Kompany looking to keep his 100 percent record as Bayern head coach. Although Hiroki Ito has returned…

arts.ttl: Harry Kane loving Bayern Munich partnership with Michael Olise
arts.sum: The 22-year-old, whom the Bavarians plucked out of English Premier League side Crystal Palace, is off to an electric start in Germany — flashing both goal-scoring and assisting abilities coming in from the left flank. It has certainly caught the eye of fellow former Premier League stalwart Harry Kane, who linked up twice with Olise — supplying and receiving an assist — in last Saturday’s demolition of SV Werder Bremen.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich’s Max Eberl says Bundesliga has gotten more exciting with increased competition
arts.sum: We have competitors like Leverkusen, Dortmund and Leipzig, who have always reached the Champions League in recent years. Bayern Munich ’s stranglehold on the league trophy may have been snapped after 11 straight years, but that won’t mean they will let it stay that way.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich vs Bayer Leverkusen: Gamethread and Live Blog
arts.sum: Bayern Munich have always been THE team to beat in German football, a reputation earned courtesy of a long history of silverware at the very top level of professional football. Coming off a week where twenty goals were scored, people expect big things from this Bayern Munich side.
